subcodes.first_line: Thy letter hath reached the Most Great Prison, and that which was mentioned therein hath been heard. God willing, thou shalt ever drink from the Kawthar [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتابت در سجن اعظم حاضر و آنچه در او مذکور باصغا فائز انشاء الله لازال از کوثر
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @praise and encouragement
